title: METALBUILD EVA 01 rumor
wikitext:
[]: METALBUILD EVA 01 (rumor)             Quote Post by DrthRvn » Wed Feb 14, 2018 9:01 pm In the last Tamashii Nations event, It was revealed that Ikuto Yamashita (designer of the EVAs) was collaborating with Bandai for a figure on the METALBUILD line, but something that caught my attention was the fact that the design does not seem to fit with any EVA 01 look seen previously. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: METALBUILD EVA 01 (rumor)             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Feb 14, 2018 9:06 pm Could it be something from ANIMA?

[]: Re: METALBUILD EVA 01 (rumor)             Quote Post by DrthRvn » Wed Feb 14, 2018 9:15 pm kuribo-04 wrote: Could it be something from ANIMA?

[]: Re: METALBUILD EVA 01 (rumor)             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Feb 14, 2018 9:19 pm kuribo-04 wrote: Could it be something from ANIMA?

[]: Re: METALBUILD EVA 01 (rumor)             Quote Post by Joseki » Thu Feb 15, 2018 4:10 am kuribo-04 wrote: Could it be something from ANIMA?

[]: Re: METALBUILD EVA 01 (rumor)             Quote Post by Cybermat47 » Thu Feb 15, 2018 4:54 am Joseki wrote: It's not from ANIMA, but the style is Yamashita-like. I hope it's a "Wille Unit 01" from 3.0+1.0.

[]: Re: METALBUILD EVA 01 (rumor)             Quote Post by Joseki » Thu Feb 15, 2018 5:30 am Cybermat47 wrote: If the Wunder is destroyed, 01 will only be useful as a combat Eva. I’m hoping that that happens.

[]: Re: METALBUILD EVA 01 (rumor)             Quote Post by Cybermat47 » Thu Feb 15, 2018 6:14 am Joseki wrote: They kept Unit 01 armored for a reason. As a battery it didn't really need to wear its combat armor, and Shinji too didn't really need the choker if he only had to be kept under strict surveillance inside the Wunder. Desperate times call for desperate measures, I'm sure Wille knows that.

[]: Re: METALBUILD EVA 01 (rumor)             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Feb 15, 2018 9:07 am Joseki wrote: They kept Unit 01 armored for a reason.

[]: Re: METALBUILD EVA 01 (rumor)             Quote Post by Joseki » Thu Feb 15, 2018 10:07 am In my mind the most logical and safe approach would have been using Unit 01's core as a battery and remove the "useless" bits around it but I guess that doing nothing it's a equally logic approach because it requires less work. I just can't imagine Wille having a pilot for a functioning Eva and not at least considering to deploy it on the battlefield. The battle against Mark.09 and Evangelion 13 could have been a catastrophic failure resulting in the loss of Unit 02, 08 and the Wunder, they can't be picky with their weapons. Ultimately I think Anno simply needed Unit 01 to be ready for Shinji in the final movie, and a in universe explanation will be decided based on how the plot of 3.0+1.0 will evolve.

[]: Re: METALBUILD EVA 01 (rumor)             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Thu Feb 15, 2018 11:49 am Perhaps it had to be modified to be used inside the AAA WUNDER, or maybe being inside it physically altered it's armour. Another likely cause is when it Awakened at the end of Break, Ritsuko says something about it "physically changing", so this may have been the result. I suppose we won't know until Unit 01 inevitably bursts out of the WUNDER in spectacular fashion. I just hope there's some sort of visual reference to how Unit 01 burst out of Leleil's quantum shadow in Neon Genesis.

[]: Re: METALBUILD EVA 01 (rumor)             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Feb 15, 2018 12:27 pm Ritsuko was referring to the changes happening right before our eyes: pseudo-evolution into a Radiant Giant. Casting aside its humanoid shape, it's now regaining its original form. Breaking free of humanity's grip, it's transforming itself into a divine entity. Inside the huge swells of complementarity, it's binding together the heavens, the earth, and all creation, transforming into an energy condensate.

[]: Re: METALBUILD EVA 01 (rumor)             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Fri Feb 16, 2018 7:42 am Until we get some news to the contrary, I'm just going to roll with this assumption that this design was created exclusively for the figure. I don't doubt Unit 01 will get a new look in the next movie but I'd rather not be disappointed if this design is cool and it's not this.

[]: Re: METALBUILD EVA 01 (rumor)             Quote Post by JohnBooty » Sat Feb 17, 2018 9:48 pm That's a pretty cool design, but it's pretty generic "big anime robot" stuff. It just doesn't look "Evangelion" to me. The main distinguishing feature of Evas (at least in the mainline series and movies) is that they are slender. Also they usually have a more bestial posture; they're not just standing there all upright like a Gundam or Mazinger or etc etc etc.

[]: Re: METALBUILD EVA 01 (rumor)             Quote Post by Cybermat47 » Sat Feb 17, 2018 11:11 pm JohnBooty wrote: That's a pretty cool design, but it's pretty generic "big anime robot" stuff. It just doesn't look "Evangelion" to me. The main distinguishing feature of Evas (at least in the mainline series and movies) is that they are slender. Also they usually have a more bestial posture; they're not just standing there all upright like a Gundam or Mazinger or etc etc etc.

[]: Re: METALBUILD EVA 01 (rumor)             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu Mar 29, 2018 8:07 am kuribo-04 wrote: Could it be something from ANIMA?

[]: Re: METALBUILD EVA 01 (rumor)             Quote Post by ACGT-Samael » Fri Mar 30, 2018 10:28 am What exactly is that last picture of the red thing? It certainly doesn't look anything like the outline from the first two pictures. Still, I really like that design. It reminds me of the proportions of Adam and the Evas in the original show with a massive chest and an abdomen thinner than its legs. It's especially nice after I was worried being repurposed as a battery was Anno's way of writing Unit-01 out of the Rebuilds.

[]: Re: METALBUILD EVA 01 (rumor)             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Mar 30, 2018 10:52 am ACGT-Samael wrote: What exactly is that last picture of the red thing? It certainly doesn't look anything like the outline from the first two pictures. Still, I really like that design. It reminds me of the proportions of Adam and the Evas in the original show with a massive chest and an abdomen thinner than its legs. It's especially nice after I was worried being repurposed as a battery was Anno's way of writing Unit-01 out of the Rebuilds.

[]: Re: METALBUILD EVA 01 (rumor)             Quote Post by ACGT-Samael » Fri Mar 30, 2018 10:59 am Joseki wrote: You have to look on the right, not at the figure in that picture.

[]: Re: METALBUILD EVA 01 (rumor)             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Apr 25, 2018 7:30 am I wonder if we might see a prototype of this guy at the August Wonderfest? A new Unit 01 design seems like the kind of thing they'd want to show off there to build up hype for pre-orders. The lantern festival is also in early August so maybe we'll know by then whether or not this is the new official Unit 01.
